title: Smods Mod Manifest
description: Metadata describing a Smods mod. Saved as <mod_id>.json inside the mod folder.

id.description: Unique identifier. No spaces. "Smods", "Lovely", and "Balatro" are reserved.

name.description: Display name shown in the mod menu.

display_name.description: Optional shorter name shown in the side menu.

author.description: List of author names. Must be an array even for a single author.

description.description: Brief description. For rich formatting, use a localization entry at G.localization.descriptions.Mod[id].

prefix.description: Prepended to all object keys registered by the mod. Must be unique across installed mods.

main_file.description: Entry-point Lua file, loaded when the mod is initialized. Must include the .lua extension.

priority.description: Load priority — lower numbers load first. Ties are broken alphabetically by ID.

badge_colour.description: Hex colour (6 digits, no leading #) for the mod badge background.

badge_text_colour.description: Hex colour (6 digits, no leading #) for the mod badge text.

dependencies.description: Mods this mod requires. Constraints use the (>=1.2.3) syntax.

conflicts.description: Mods this mod is incompatible with.

provides.description: Declares this mod satisfies dependencies on another mod ID (useful for API stand-ins).

dump_loc.description: Dev-only: dumps localization changes to file on startup. Do NOT ship with this enabled.
